stemHtml: With VNAV engaged the autothrust system uses (1) _____ and (2) _____.

options.a: (1) Data provided by the FMC, (2) the throttle lever moves.
options.b: (1) Data inserted into the MCU, (2) the throttle lever doesn’t move.
options.c: (1) Data inserted into the MCU, (2) the throttle lever moves.
options.d: (1) Data provided by the FMC, (2) the throttle lever doesn’t move.
